scripts.build: if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then forge build; else echo 'forge not installed; skipping (install via foundryup)'; fi
scripts.test: if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then forge test && npm run check-abi; else echo 'forge not installed; skipping'; fi
scripts.check-abi: bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "check-abi requires jq — install it first"; exit 1; }; diff <(jq .abi out/IClanWorld.sol/IClanWorld.json) <(jq .abi abi/IClanWorld.json) || { echo "ABI DRIFT: abi/IClanWorld.json is stale — run: forge build && cp out/IClanWorld.sol/IClanWorld.json abi/IClanWorld.json"; exit 1; }'
